query:
SELECT 
  extensivOrderId,
  referenceNum,
  extensivStatus,
  lifecycleStatus,
  clientId,
  facilityId,
  creationDate
FROM order_tracking
WHERE referenceNum IN ('3380922','3381901','3381903','3381904','3381905','3387496','3391434','3391436')
ORDER BY creationDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
